description: TENTH POST-EOM-CLOSURE POLL (~12.4h after prior 2026-05-05T23:07Z, on cadence). 8 EOM PREDs (PRED-077, -081, -085, -087, -088, -090, -106, -111) at d=6.48 past 'April 2026' close — STILL Step 10b day-4-7 SEVERITY MEDIUM band; per Step 10b 'no new dedicated chg-* needed — prior dedicated (chg-20260504-1106-002) stands until band transition or adjudication signal'. Used curl -o file pattern, no hash drift. KEY FINDING #1: MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT NOW 18.98d / 455.46h — 19d THRESHOLD PENDING in ~0.54h at 2026-05-06T12:02:38Z; 34 consecutive auto-only polls (was 33); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z. THIS IS THE 5TH CONSECUTIVE HOLD WITHOUT REGISTRY UPDATE — sustained-gate precedent SET. The dome's daily AI review pipeline has now held registry counters static for 5 consecutive daily reviews while the prospective queue remains unprocessed. Gate-release inversion did NOT occur at HOLD #15. KEY FINDING #3: ECLIPSE_DAYS DECREMENTED 98→97 between status_history entries 23:35:25Z (98) and 01:16:15Z (97); cadence (1-decrement-per-UTC-day at midnight UTC) confirmed. Now 97 days to 2026-08-12 eclipse. 8 commits since prior poll (ALL auto: 5 Auto-update ECM status + 2 ECM data pull + 1 daily AI review = 8 auto, 0 manual). Live status_history.json 579 entries (was 574; +5 from 5 Auto-update appends — exact match); latest entry 2026-05-06T09:59:56Z (matches commit c118f26 at 10:00:01Z), ECLIPSE_DAYS=97, wins_confirmed=67 (67-vs-69 mismatch unchanged), version V51.0 (auto-pipeline internal counter unchanged). 0 source-file touches: monitor.py 9de912a8, scripts/pull_data.py aa0573fe, scripts/build_daily_review.py ceddb04f, inject_ai_layer.py 58996a0c, verify_predictions.py db947cab, generate_manifest.js 786842ed (all SHAs identical to prior 11+ polls). docs/ai_manifest.json git SHA ea66371b unchanged V51.1 last_updated=2026-04-17; docs/api/index.json byte-identical e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6 (4056 bytes) git SHA 890fb607 last_updated=2026-04-17. Parameters baseline-clean: model.html shows disc_radius 20,015 (13 occurrences, comma-separated form), firmament 8537/8619 (9+6 occurrences), refraction n(r) 0.20 (1 occurrence); predictions.html shows sun 5,733 (2x), moon 2,534 (2x), and both 0.20/0.27 in pre-existing dual context.
